purpose: Define the core iterative loop for Katala GUT after L1/S1/P1 preparation.
loop: P2 bridges all P1-submitted geometry programs using IUT mediation.
P2 attempts to produce either direct Euclidean bridge structure or local/limit Euclidean bridge structure.
If direct Euclidean execution fails, P3 attempts local execution.
If local execution fails, P3 attempts limit execution.
If all execution modes fail, feedback is returned to P2 for revision.

new_axiom_policy.introduction_condition: Only consider new axioms if repeated P2↔P3 loop failures remain structurally irreducible.
